hero.subtitle: Empowering Myanmar refugee youth through GED education, trauma healing, and community.

about.title: About Sunrise
about.missionText: Sunrise Trauma Healing Education serves Myanmar refugee teens in Mae Sot, Thailand — providing GED preparation, trauma counseling, and a safe community where students can heal and grow.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.gedDesc: Comprehensive General Educational Development courses preparing students for internationally recognized credentials.
programs.traumaDesc: Professional counseling and group healing sessions for students who have experienced displacement and trauma.
programs.counselingDesc: One-on-one support from trained counselors addressing mental health, family, and personal challenges.
programs.communityDesc: Sports, arts, field trips, and cultural events that build connection and joy among students.

enroll.title: Apply to Sunrise GED
enroll.subtitle: Take the first step toward your future.
